title: Advance venture V-2027-004 through G-03 validation verdict
decision: Proceed to Customer Discovery; validation cleared the pre-registered kill criteria.
rationale: Landing test conversion 4.1% vs 2.0% threshold; 12 of 15 interviews confirmed the pain.
assumptions: Interview sample is representative of the ICP
risks: Conversion may not hold at larger spend
rollback_plan: Archive the venture; no external commitments were made.
